items.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
items.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

items.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open-source bugs
items.summary: OpenAI is attempting to tackle the security issues of the open source software community.
